items.title: China's second typhoon in a week makes landfall
items.summary: Nearly two million people are evacuated from eastern Zhejiang province, with the city of Wenzhou close to the path of the storm.

items.title: Iran supreme leader calls for revenge after father's burial
items.summary: Mojtaba Khamenei says vengeance is "inevitable" for the killing, which happened on the first day of the US-Israeli war on Iran.

items.title: Spain battles to contain one of its deadliest wildfires as at least 12 killed
items.summary: At least four Britons are believed to be among the victims of the blaze, which left another 23 people missing.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 烏克蘭無人機破壞威力升級　俄羅斯面臨消耗戰困境
